verdicts.corrected_value: Provider of an MCP (modular connector) FX audit server and related payment/FX connector software (appears to publish connector code on GitHub rather than host public API docs).
verdicts.reasoning: The homepage describes iPayX as a provider of an FX forensic audit layer, which aligns with the recorded description.
The GitHub repository does not provide any information about supported authentication methods, making the claim unsupported.
The vendor homepage does not provide any information about credential access, and the GitHub repository does not clarify how to obtain credentials, thus the claim is unsupported.
The GitHub repository is the only developer-facing resource and indicates that there is no public API documentation available, confirming the claim of 'none_public'.
The lack of public API documentation and credential issuance flow confirms that building an integration against a public vendor API is blocked.
